mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals stronger labor market conditions, increasing corporate earnings visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates expanding consumer and business demand, creating positive momentum in S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the combined RSAFS-HOUST signal drops below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals weakening supply-side capacity, leading to higher inflation expectations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO declines by >2.0pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month job gains (PAYEMS) indicate robust labor market conditions, increasing consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances with positive PAYEMS growth.

mechanism_narrative: A 12-month increase in CPI inflation (CPIAUCSL) above 3% signals central bank intervention risks, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 3% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP (GDPC1) paired with rising housing starts (HOUST) indicates divergent demand signals, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for the GDPC1-HOUST interaction drops below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) combined with rising oil prices (not in catalog) would signal supply shocks, but with available data, we use INDPRO alone to predict negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO declines by >1.5pp over 3 months.
